title: Editas Medicine Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Results and Business Updates
text: Editas Medicine reported full year 2024 net loss of $237.1 million or $2.88 per share, compared to net loss of $153.2 million or $2.02 per share in 2023. Full year revenues of $32.3 million declined from $78.1 million in 2023, primarily due to revenue recognized from an upfront payment under the Vertex license agreement executed in December 2023. R&D expenses increased by $21.5 million to $199.2 million for 2024. G&A expenses rose by $2.3 million to $72.0 million. The company recorded restructuring charges of $12.2 million in Q4 related to discontinuing reni-cel development and workforce reduction. As of December 31, 2024, Editas held $269.9 million in cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities, providing operational runway into Q2 2027. Q4 2024 net loss was $45.4 million compared to $18.9 million in Q4 2023. Revenue for Q4 2024 was $30.6 million, below estimates of $32.23 million, down from $60.0 million in Q4 2023. The company ended development of reni-cel after extensive partnership search failed to yield commercial partner. Strategic shift toward in vivo gene editing with two lead candidates identified in 2024 and plans to declare two additional development candidates by mid-2025.
